title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: ROSEBURG HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 400 W Harvard Avenue Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Students, staff, and children ages 0-19 in the school district Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 7am-3:30pm Email (541) 492-2055 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 492-2055 Main phone Main phone (541) 492-2055 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, some private insurance plans, and offers sliding scale fees. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - WOMEN REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROSEBURG HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
